blended.narrative: Grand Targhee is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 6,484 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 4" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 74.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 62".
